judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements (a line-drawn map with three contour lines labeled 10^-6, 10^-5, 10^-4 over structures and roads), but Description B adds the specific title and caption text that A omits, without any contradiction.
original_image_tags: A line-drawn map depicting a geographical area with a coastline (likely a cape or peninsula) and various roads and facilities. The map is overlaid with contour lines labeled "10^-6", "10^-5", and "10^-4", indicating risk levels for inner-ear injury. The contour lines originate from a central point within the facility complex. There are numerous small structures and facility icons depicted on the map.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A black-and-white scientific map/diagram titled “Atlas IIAS Risk Contours for Inner-Ear Injury with A = 3.5,” showing contour lines labeled 10^-6, 10^-5, and 10^-4 over a site map with roads, many plotted symbols, and a dense cluster of markers near the center.*
